name: job-scheduler
description: Fair FIFO scheduler for Fireworks fine-tuning jobs, backed by Supabase.

scripts.seed: node -e "if(!(process.env.SUPABASE_URL||'').match(/^https?:\/\/(127\.0\.0\.1|localhost|kong)/)){console.error('ERROR: refusing seed -- SUPABASE_URL is not local:',process.env.SUPABASE_URL||'(unset)');process.exit(2)}" && node scripts/seed_users.js
